meta.notes: Every image slot on the site. reference_status: has-reference = a real asset exists (owner logo); generate-from-scratch = generic marketing/mood imagery OK to AI-generate; blocked-awaiting-photos = MUST be a real owner photo of the actual plate/room — never AI-faked. Generation channel this session = Higgsfield MCP generate_image (the plugin's CDP `higgsfield-workflow generate` needs a local browser + Higgsfield login, unavailable headless). Exports land at output_file; verify with higgsfield-workflow verify.

images.prompt: Owner-provided shark-captain roundel logo. Do not regenerate. Web-optimized copies at public/images/logo-nav.png and logo-lg.png.

Appetizing overhead spread of golden fried catfish, breaded jumbo shrimp, wings, hush puppies and fries in paper-lined baskets on dark navy weathered wood, lemon wedges, sauce cups, warm moody light, nautical gold accents, professional food photography.

Big family-style fried seafood and chicken feast in to-go pans and baskets on a table: mounds of fried catfish, wings, jumbo shrimp, fries and hush puppies, cups of sauce, sharing scene, warm inviting light, nautical navy and gold styling, professional food photography.
images.negative_prompt: text, watermark, brand logos, hands, faces

images.prompt: Basket of assorted golden fried fish fillets — catfish, perch and tilapia — with lemon wedges and tartar sauce on dark wood, crispy breading close-up, warm light, professional food photography.
Pile of crispy golden fried chicken wings in a paper-lined basket with a side of fries, dark wood table, warm moody light, professional food photography.
Golden hand-breaded fried chicken tenders with fries and dipping sauce in a basket on dark wood, crispy texture, warm light, professional food photography.
Basket of breaded golden fried jumbo shrimp with lemon and cocktail sauce on dark wood, crispy coating, warm moody light, professional food photography.
Spread of fried sides — golden hush puppies, fries, cheese curds and onion rings — in small baskets on dark wood, warm light, professional food photography.
Slices of classic diner desserts — cheesecake, banana pudding and carrot cake — on small plates, cozy warm light, professional food photography.
Hero-style overhead fried seafood and chicken spread for a social share card, dark navy wood, gold accents, appetizing, professional food photography, room for a title overlay.
REAL owner photo required — the restaurant's actual catfish plate as served. Do not AI-generate a specific dish and present it as theirs.
images.blocker_notes: Drop a real photo into reference-photos/ and run higgsfield-workflow intake.

images.prompt: REAL owner photo required — the restaurant's actual wings as served.
REAL owner photo required — the actual counter/dining room at 1616 1st Ave NE. Do not AI-fake a storefront or interior.
images.blocker_notes: Real storefront/interior photo only — AI-faking a real place's premises is misleading.
